text:
Hi There

Here is the error message that i get from the terminal :
===>  Installing for lmms-1.2.2_8,2
===>  Checking if lmms is already installed
===>   Registering installation for lmms-1.2.2_8,2
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/audio/lmms/work/stage/usr/local/lib/lmms/libgigplayer.so:No such file or directory

Is this what you need or do you need anything else ?
